prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-CHRMWBOTTLE-23OZ Product Type: BOTTLE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Chrome Finish Leak Proof Glass Water Bottle 23oz with Bamboo Lid Description: The ASR Outdoor chrome-finish water bottle is made of thick, durable borosilicate glass that will keep your water cold. This style of water bottle has an old-fashioned look and the chrome-finish glass gives even an ordinary water bottle an elegant appearance.

This water bottle holds up to 23 fluid ounces (about 3 cups), which will encourage you to up your daily water intake. Staying hydrated is very important for overall health, and can assist with weight loss and improved sleep.

Since this water bottle is made of glass, you don't need to worry about harmful plastic toxins like BPA. It comes with a bamboo airtight lid that will keep your liquids safe and secure during travel, making this a great portable water bottle option.

Although the Beille water bottle is made of glass, it still weighs less than one pound so it won't add too much bulk to your travel bag, purse, or gym bag. Make sure to take it with you to maintain hydration throughout your work or school day.

PLEASE NOTE: This water bottle is hand wash only, meant for cold drinks only, and is not microwavable. Search Terms: glass water bottle with lid flip top glass bottle water bottle kids 23oz hydroflask motivational large capacity big reusable ecofriendly for bikes cycling filtered travel bottle hydration infuser coldest daily water intake Features: - CHROME FINISH WATER BOTTLE - The ASR Outdoor chrome-finish water bottle is made of thick, durable borosilicate glass that will keep your water cold. This style of water bottle has an old-fashioned look and the chrome-finish glass gives even an ordinary water bottle an elegant appearance. - LARGE CAPACITY - This water bottle holds up to 23 fluid ounces (about 3 cups), which will encourage you to up your daily water intake. Staying hydrated is very important for overall health, and can assist with weight loss and improved sleep. - BPA FREE MATERIALS - Since this water bottle is made of glass, you don't need to worry about harmful plastic toxins like BPA. It comes with a bamboo airtight lid that will keep your liquids safe and secure during travel, making this a great portable water bottle option. - LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - Although the Beille water bottle is made of glass, it still weighs less than one pound so it won't add too much bulk to your travel bag, purse, or gym bag. Make sure to take it with you to maintain hydration throughout your work or school day! - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: glass, rubber; Color: chrome finish; Capacity: 23oz (about 3 cups); Weight: .78lbs (12.48oz); BPA free: yes; Lid type: airtight; Hand wash only; For cold drinks only; Not microwaveable === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 23oz Chrome Glass Water Bottle with Bamboo Lid

tokens.name: Glass Water Bottle with Bamboo Lid

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 23oz Chrome Finish Glass Water Bottle

anthropic.title_differentiation: Borosilicate Glass, BPA-Free, Leak-Proof Bamboo Lid, Lightweight, Cold Drinks Only, Hand Wash

openai.title_differentiation: Borosilicate Glass, Bamboo Airtight Lid, BPA Free, Lightweight 23 Oz Capacity, Cold Drinks Only, Hand Wash Only
